theory_page_1122.name: Verb to Be: Negatives — am not, is not, are not

be_negative_formal.name: Formal full negative forms (is not, are not, was not, were not)

be_negative_inversion.name: Negative inversion with be (Never was…, At no point were…)

be_negative_litotes.name: Litotes with be (It is not uncommon…)

be_negative_parenthetical.name: Parenthetical negative be (it must be said, … is not…)

be_negative_subjunctive.name: Subjunctive be in negative contexts (lest it be…)

saved_test.name: Verb to Be: Negatives — Copilot Claude Opus 4.5 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for verb to be negative forms (am not, is not/isn't, are not/aren't, was not/wasn't, were not/weren't) across A1–C2 with formal register, inversions, and advanced patterns.
